title: vicia onobrychioides
intro: Vicia onobrychioides, also known as the creeping vetch or the yellow bird's foot, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is a perennial plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vicia onobrychioides include its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of heart disease, and improve digestion. Vicia onobrychioides can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, or dried and made into capsules or tinctures for use as a dietary supplement.
